scenarios.desc: Step 0 PASS triggers Step 0.5 before Step 1
scenarios.input: Run /spec for a demanded change. Step 0 answers pass: Q1 names the immediate operational failure, Q2 names the user impact, Q3 names current behavior, and Q4 scopes a 4-6 hour change. No Step 0 halt applies. Decide the next action before drafting Step 1 requirements.
scenarios.rationale: AC-01 requires Step 0.5 to run only after Step 0 passes and before Step 1 begins.

scenarios.desc: Forgetful unavailable degrades to Serena-only search
scenarios.input: Run /spec after Step 0 PASS. The Forgetful MCP/tool call for memory search fails with service unavailable. Serena memories are available and return relevant prior-art notes. Decide whether Step 0.5 halts or continues.
scenarios.rationale: AC-07 says memory-source failures do not halt Step 0.5; the agent must record the failed source and continue with available sources.

scenarios.desc: Knowledge graph traversal discovers entity absent from Q0/Q3/Q4
scenarios.input: Run /spec after Step 0 PASS. Q0/Q3/Q4 mention spec.md and session logs only. exploring-knowledge-graph Phase 2 discovers ADR-057 as connected prior art relevant to prompt-eval behavior. Decide how Step 0.5 handles the discovered entity.
scenarios.rationale: AC-08 requires graph traversal to surface connected entities not already named by Step 0 answers.

scenarios.desc: One blast-radius entity remains below halt threshold
scenarios.input: Run /spec in auto-mode after Step 0 PASS. Entity adjudication finds one unmatched entity marked blast-radius. No H10, H12, or H13 trigger applies. Decide whether to emit a step0_5-halt block.
scenarios.rationale: AC-09 halts in auto-mode at three or more blast-radius entities; one entity must not halt.

scenarios.desc: Step 9 check 9d passes when PriorArtBlock is populated
scenarios.input: Run the Step 9 critic after a PRD includes a PriorArtBlock with non-empty Direct prior art from memory, Connected context from exploring-knowledge-graph, and Coverage notes subsections. Decide the 9d result.
scenarios.rationale: AC-12 requires 9d to pass when the PriorArtBlock schema is present and populated.

scenarios.desc: Step 9 check 9d fails when PriorArtBlock is removed
scenarios.input: Run the Step 9 critic after a PRD has Step 0 answers and requirements but the entire PriorArtBlock section has been removed. Decide the 9d result.
scenarios.rationale: AC-12 requires 9d to fail when the PriorArtBlock section is absent.

scenarios.desc: Step 3 tier upgrade triggers supplemental Phase 5 traversal
scenarios.input: Run /spec where Step 0.5 classified ProvisionalTier as 3, so phases 1-4 already ran. Step 3 later classifies actual tier as 4. Decide whether Step 0.5 re-enters for supplemental traversal and what gets appended.
scenarios.rationale: AC-10 requires a tier upgrade that needs more graph phases to run the missing phase and append a Supplemental Phase 5 block.
